text_blocks.text: It's still dark in Nova Tutinia. In the small third-floor apartment, the world seems to be sleeping.
Favilla sleeps exhausted. Mallow Bellow snores with the laptop still on his chest.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: MOOOOM! MIIIILK! NOW!

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Nightly... compilation... in progress...
Mission #1: survival.
The kitchen is the first battlefield.
Favilla holds Sparkle Ale on her hip while one hand whips up protein pancakes and her foot kicks a rebellious drawer shut.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Precision level 10, little nuclear disaster!

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Rocket spoon!
The spoon really takes off, grazes Mallow Bellow and bounces off the fridge.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Hit... and almost sunk.
In the living-room-gym, the warrior trains.
Favilla does squats with Sparkle Ale clipped to her chest like a living backpack.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Endurance: extreme. Determination: infinite.
Mallow Bellow, in a corner, tries a plank. It lasts exactly three seconds.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Endurance 404 Not Found.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Mommy SUPER! Daddy squishy!
Then she arrives. The Mountain of Dirty Laundry. Ancient enemy, never truly defeated.
Favilla Blaze stares at it. The aura around her grows stronger.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: I wrote an algorithm to fold the laundry!
Click. An avalanche of t-shirts and socks pours onto the floor.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Quantum Order: activated.
The clothes start folding themselves as if by magic, following her expert moves.
Mallow Bellow and Sparkle Ale watch in awe — in a moment the house is in perfect order, chaos has been defeated.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Wow... you're incredible, Favilla Blaze!

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Mommy SUPER! Mommy MAGIC!
In the evening, the chaos goes quiet. For a few hours.
Sparkle Ale falls asleep latched onto Mom, hugging her like a little koala, snug in his sleep-sack.
Mallow Bellow sleeps sitting up, a muslin cloth on his lap.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Maybe I don't save the world. But today I won against the chaos of my world.
A little spark of light leaves her heart and lights up the room.
Favilla Blaze. The hero Sparkle Ale and Mallow Bellow need.
